sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10828" key="a)nudreu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνυδρ-εύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n10828.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">draw up from a well,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸν κάδον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">76</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
